projectDescription: A Cloudflare Worker that exposes R2 object storage operations as a remote MCP server, secured with GitHub OAuth, for use with ChatGPT and other MCP clients.
keyFeatures: Remote MCP server for Cloudflare R2 deployable on Cloudflare Workers
GitHub OAuth authentication with configurable login allowlist
Object operations: list, head, get, put, put-if-absent, delete, copy, move, rename
Optional presigned GET/PUT URL generation via R2 S3-compatible API
Optional read-only Cloudflare account/admin tools (buckets, CORS, lifecycle, domains, notifications, metrics)
R2_ROOT_PREFIX for scoping object operations to a bucket subtree
Destructive operation guards: confirm:true required, dryRun:true supported
Configurable payload limits: MAX_INLINE_TEXT_BYTES, MAX_TRANSFER_BYTES, MAX_LIST_LIMIT
Health endpoint at /healthz with bucket accessibility check
AUTH_MODE=none for local development or externally protected environments
publicApiSurface: GET /healthz — health check, returns config state and bucket accessibility
GET|POST /mcp — remote MCP endpoint (streamable HTTP)
GET /authorize — begins GitHub OAuth authorization
POST /authorize — approves OAuth client and redirects to GitHub
GET /callback — GitHub OAuth callback, validates login against allowlist
GET /token — OAuth token endpoint
GET /register — OAuth dynamic client registration endpoint
r2_object_list — list objects under root prefix
r2_object_head — return object metadata
r2_object_get — read text-like object content
r2_object_put — write UTF-8 text to an object
r2_object_put_if_absent — create object only if key does not exist
r2_object_delete — delete one object (requires confirm: true)
r2_object_delete_many — batch delete (requires confirm: true, supports dryRun: true)
r2_object_copy — copy object to a new key
r2_object_move — copy then delete source (requires confirm: true, supports dryRun: true)
r2_object_rename — rename object within prefix (requires confirm: true, supports dryRun: true)
r2_upload_base64 — upload base64-encoded binary payload
r2_download_base64 — download object as base64
r2_presign_get — generate presigned GET URL (optional, up to 7 days)
r2_presign_put — generate presigned PUT URL (optional, up to 7 days)
r2_bucket_list — list R2 buckets in account (optional, read-only)
r2_bucket_get — get single bucket metadata (optional, read-only)
r2_cors_get — get CORS rules for a bucket (optional, read-only)
r2_lifecycle_get — get lifecycle rules for a bucket (optional, read-only)
r2_domain_custom_list — list custom domains on a bucket (optional, read-only)
r2_domain_custom_get — get custom domain settings (optional, read-only)
r2_domain_managed_get — get r2.dev managed domain settings (optional, read-only)
r2_notifications_list — list event notification rules (optional, read-only)
r2_notifications_get — get one event notification queue config (optional, read-only)
r2_metrics_get — get account-level R2 metrics (optional, read-only)
